item.title: PII and secret scanning — clawhq scan
steps: Create cmd/scan.go with the scan subcommand
Extend internal/secrets/ with PII pattern scanning
Implement PII patterns: names, SSN, credit cards, phone numbers, email addresses
Implement secret patterns: ghp_*, sk-ant-*, AKIA*, Bearer tokens, JWTs, private keys
Implement false positive filtering: CHANGE_ME placeholders, env var references, comments
Add --history flag to include git history in scan
Format output as table with file, line, pattern type, and match preview (redacted)
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq scan` detects PII and secrets in agent workspace files
False positive filtering removes common benign patterns
--history flag scans git history for leaked secrets
Output shows file, line, and pattern type without exposing full secret
Exit code is non-zero when issues are found
